creator: dpolyg@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 241082
patch to update re/rem/baresip to 2.12.0

Here is the patch to 2.12.0, which is the last version before 3.0.0.
The 3.0.0 contain at least one bug that has to be fixed by upstream folks:

https://github.com/baresip/re/issues/743

so if you need 3.0.0 please wait until next release.

Regards,
Denis.
